name: type: bug
description: Something is not working as expected

name: type: feature
description: A request for new product functionality

name: type: maintenance
description: Internal upkeep, cleanup, or technical maintenance

name: status: needs-review
description: Ready for product or technical review

name: status: considering
description: Being evaluated for product fit and feasibility

name: status: accepted
description: Approved as work WeHunt intends to pursue

name: status: planned
description: Scheduled for a future release or milestone

name: priority: critical
description: Urgent issue with severe user or business impact

name: priority: high
description: Important work that should be addressed soon

name: area: accounts
description: Authentication, account linking, or account settings

name: area: profiles
description: User profiles and public profile pages

name: area: ui
description: User interface, usability, or visual design

name: needs-information
description: More information is needed from the reporter

name: cannot-reproduce
description: The reported behavior could not be reproduced
